summary: Frontend testing of Mira conversational AI - All 4 canonical flows verified with correct quick-reply chips matching questions. Fixed Travel flow chips bug. UI is clean with light background, amber question strips, and products opt-in working correctly.

birthday_flow.question_strip: Before we shape anything, I'd like to check in with you: Would you like this to be something active and playful for him, or a simpler, cosy celebration this year?
chips: I know I want a cake too

grooming_flow.question_strip: To get this right for him, are you thinking of a simple trim just to keep him comfortable, or a fuller grooming session with a bath, ear cleaning, and nail care?
chips: I'm not sure, tell me more

treats_flow.question_strip: Are you thinking of everyday light treats, or something a bit more special-occasion for him right now?

travel_flow.note: Fixed - was showing generic Yes/No chips before fix

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/MiraDemoPage.jsx - Fixed extractQuickReplies to handle 'driving or flying' pattern for Travel flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 canonical flows (Birthday, Grooming, Treats, Travel) now show correct chips matching the questions. Travel flow was fixed - the extractQuickReplies function now handles 'driving or flying' pattern in addition to 'car/flight/train'. UI is clean with light background, amber question strips working, products opt-in rule enforced. Mobile responsive layout working.

features_verified.birthday_chips: FIXED - Shows: Active and playful, Simpler and cosy, I'm not sure yet, I know I want a cake too
features_verified.grooming_chips: WORKING - Shows: Simple trim, Full grooming session, I'm not sure tell me more
features_verified.treats_chips: WORKING - Shows: Everyday light treats, Special-occasion treats, I'm not sure yet
features_verified.travel_chips: FIXED - Shows: Car, Flight, Train, Not sure yet (was showing Yes/No before)

bug_fix_applied.issue: Travel flow chips showed generic 'Yes/No/Tell me more' instead of 'Car/Flight/Train'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added pattern matching for 'driving or flying' in addition to 'car/flight/train'
